chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S- 643 of 2024. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For non-prosecution. Process copies not supplied by the counsel for issuance of notices. 21.11.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Addl. P.G a/w SIP Dhani Bux on behalf of SSP Sukkur and SIP Sikander Ali P.S Saleh Pat. ========== Though notices were ordered but could be issued as the applicant failed to supply process copies therefore, matter is fixed for non- prosecution. However, Mr.Shafique Ahmed files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.3 Madad Ali along with statement and certain documents, taken on record. Statements filed by respondents No.1 and 2 are also taken on record. Heard learned counsel for the applicant and respondent No.3 as well as Addl. P.G and perused the material brought on record. From the perusal of record it reflects that six persons have received serious injuries from the complainant party for which medical certificates were also issued by the doctor. Impugned order dated 30.10.2024 passed by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace does not suffer from any illegality or infirmity. In the circumstances, instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application being devoid of merits is dismissed. J U D G E Shabir/P.S
